{{Shell
|name={{PAGENAME}}
|image={{PAGENAME}}.png
|description=Snail Shell was part of a huge wooden horse when it was first designed. Then a traveler realized that its head can be removed and used as a standalone Snail Shell.
|affct=ART
|hard=DEF
|source=Divine Order Chest (0.8%)
|color=green
|earth=1
|water=2
|fire=2
|wind=1
|form=Demon
|element=Fire
|realm=Hellas
|orangehard=RUSH
}}
